name: conversational-graph-skills
description: Build a conversational agent as a code-driven graph / state machine — focused nodes (each with its own prompt + tools) connected by forward/back transitions, with deterministic gates — in your own stack instead of a mega-prompt or a hosted workflow platform.

plugins.name: conversational-graph-skills
plugins.description: Use when building a conversational agent as a code-driven graph / state machine — routing a chat through focused stages (nodes with their own prompt + tools) via forward/back transitions — or when a stage-routing bot mis-routes, hallucinates a completed action, or a security gate leaks.
